'''Gogol''' owned the [[Lucky Star (Elerion)|Lucky Star]], which was one of the largest casinos in the [[Kushal Vogh]] on [[Elerion]]. He planned to help [[Nescan Tal'yo]] give his [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but his plan was foiled by the [[Quetzal Sisters]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who destroyed the cube.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}} {{1st}}
